use base64::{Engine as _, engine::general_purpose};

fn store_token(token: &[u8]) -> String {
    // BAD: base64 encode only to decode in the same process
    general_purpose::STANDARD.encode(token)
}

fn retrieve_token(encoded: &str) -> Vec<u8> {
    general_purpose::STANDARD.decode(encoded).unwrap()
}

fn process_auth(token: &[u8]) {
    let encoded = store_token(token);
    // Stored in in-memory cache, not sent over network
    cache_insert("auth_token", &encoded);

    let decoded = retrieve_token(&encoded);
    validate_token(&decoded);
}
